title: TW Function
description: The Timer Wait function TW returns the status of the preceding Wait condition with time interval with False (wait condition was satisfied) or True (time interval has elapsed).
see_also:
TMOut, Wait, Hand_TW

TW Function Example

Wait Sw(0)=On, 5   'Waits up to 5 seconds for input bit 0 On

If TW = True Then

  Print "Time Up"  'Displays "Time UP" after 5 seconds

EndIf
examples:
Wait Sw(0)=On, 5   'Waits up to 5 seconds for input bit 0 On
If TW = True Then Print "Time Up"  'Displays "Time UP" after 5 seconds
EndIf
